Headline: #52 Kedzie/California Temporary Reroute at Kedzie/59th
ShortDescription: #52 Kedzie/California buses are rrtd via Kedzie, 59th, California, 67th and Kedzie, then will resume their normal route due to street blockage near Kedzie/59th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#52 Kedzie/California buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Kedzie, 59th, California, 67th and Kedzie, then will resume their normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage near Kedzie/59th.

Headline: #4 and #115 Temporary Reroute near Cottage Grove / 111th
ShortDescription: Northbound #4 and #115 buses are temporarily rerouted via King Drive/107th/Cottage Grove due to Construction near Cottage Grove / 111th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound #4 Cottage Grove and #115 Pullman / 115th buses are temporarily rerouted via King Drive, 107th and Cottage Grove, then will resume their normal route due to Construction near Cottage Grove / 111th .

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
